name: KPI Grid
description: A grid of key performance indicator cards showing metrics with labels, values, and trend indicators

dashboard.description: 4-column grid of stat cards with icon, label, value, and change percentage

compact.description: Denser 2-row layout with smaller cards, no icons, just label + value + sparkline placeholder

slots.sparkline: Placeholder area for inline sparkline chart
